title: Andy Burnham wins U.K. Parliament seat, key step in bid to oust prime minister
summary_full: Burnham, the mayor of Greater Manchester, is now positioned to challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer for leadership of the governing Labour Party and to seize the top job.
